_publications._publicationTitle: Revisiting the NPcis mouse model: A new tool to model plexiform neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: 50% (9 out of 18) of sciatic nerves injured using the cut method develop a plexiform neurofibroma within 1 to 6 months
